raise_justifications.backend/routers/chat.py: The reply-draft lane registers with the existing chat admission owner in routers/chat.py, which already holds the rate limit, chat-quota guard and structured-output routing the drafts path reuses; a separate module would split one drafting route from the guards that admit it.
raise_justifications.backend/routers/users.py: GET /v1/users/subscription serializes the new mobile plus/max plans as `unlimited` for clients whose plan enum predates them, so day-one buyers read as paid instead of Free (mirrors the existing operator remap); real limits/grandfather are computed from the true plan first.
raise_justifications.backend/routers/sync.py: Fresh Sync admission and final Cloud Tasks ledger recovery retain their coupled task, lock, ledger, and staged-blob lifecycle in the existing ingestion owner rather than a new module.
